notes: The engineering layer is additive. The verse is named as ontological-substrate-claim; the engineering analog is named as one register among others. Sanskrit terms (tatam, avyaya, avināśi) appear as register markers, not as proof that 'the Gita is really about API contracts.' The disagreements field preserves the Advaita/Vishishtadvaita divergence. literal_meaning and traditional_meaning_consensus carry the metaphysical scope. The chapter thesis explicitly states the substrate doctrine should not be flattened into 'embrace change' — the engineering layer respects that. PASS.
